prompt: Create a surreal macro miniature food landscape titled MINI TOKYO, showing Tokyo rising from a vast ground of fine golden-white cane sugar crystals like a desert at night. The composition is a square cinematic diorama with shallow depth of field, dramatic blue-purple smoky background, soft mist between buildings, and warm pink-red edible lighting. In the center stands 1 dominant Tokyo Tower, meticulously built from stacked glossy red pepper strips and pale candy rings, glowing orange at its base. To the right stands 1 tall Tokyo Skytree made from pale sugar sticks and white confectionery rods. Surround them with exactly 16 miniature edible skyscrapers and towers in the hazy background, including 1 black-and-white crisscross oval tower, 1 red-and-white striped cylindrical tower, 1 small clock-tower-like building, 2 pagoda-style towers, 1 green glass luxury storefront labeled PRADA, and additional candy-block high-rises made of wafers, gummies, marshmallows, biscuits, and pepper slices. In the foreground, create a tiny Japanese garden made from broccoli, herbs, leafy greens, cauliflower florets, pink pickled ginger, and candy-like shrubs. Add exactly 1 red torii gate at the edge of a glossy dark teal pond, with exactly 2 glowing red lanterns beside it and exactly 3 floating sushi-shaped boats in the water. Use deep navy, magenta, candy red, sugar white, moss green, and warm orange. Place the title text in the upper left in elegant white serif typography, with small uppercase “MINI” above large spaced-out “TOKYO.” Ultra-detailed food styling, macro photography realism, whimsical edible architecture, magical miniature scale, crisp foreground textures, bokeh city depth, no people, no watermark.
